title: The generated bootstrap freshness contract cannot detect host drift for this repo
description: Remediate BOOT003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Hash stack-sensitive repo surfaces plus host-side prerequisite signals so bootstrap becomes stale when the machine setup changes, then rerun environment_bootstrap after package repair installs the stronger freshness model.
summary: Hash stack-sensitive repo surfaces plus host-side prerequisite signals so bootstrap becomes stale when the machine setup changes, then rerun environment_bootstrap after package repair installs the stronger freshness model.

title: Wave-based Godot gameplay defines a start_wave entrypoint that nothing in the runtime ever invokes
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-010 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: When a gameplay controller exposes start_wave() and wave_started, make one canonical runtime owner call start_wave() so the primary progression loop actually begins on the current build.
summary: When a gameplay controller exposes start_wave() and wave_started, make one canonical runtime owner call start_wave() so the primary progression loop actually begins on the current build.

title: Godot repo ships a game-over scene, but the death path only reloads the current scene instead of reaching that fail-state
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-011 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: If the repo ships a game-over scene or equivalent fail-state surface, route death/failure handlers into that scene instead of silently reloading the current level.
summary: If the repo ships a game-over scene or equivalent fail-state surface, route death/failure handlers into that scene instead of silently reloading the current level.

title: Player-facing Godot UI reads singleton gameplay state that no runtime code ever updates
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-012 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: When HUD or game-over surfaces read autoload gameplay state, ensure runtime scripts write those fields directly or call the singleton's mutator methods on the current gameplay path before claiming completion.
summary: When HUD or game-over surfaces read autoload gameplay state, ensure runtime scripts write those fields directly or call the singleton's mutator methods on the current gameplay path before claiming completion.

title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: Interactive consumer-facing repo still relies on a weak generic finish bar instead of explicit interaction-proof requirements
description: Remediate FINISH004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Replace generic machine-generated finish_acceptance_signals with repo-specific interactive proof requirements, and require FINISH-VALIDATE-001 to demand user-observable interaction evidence in addition to load/export proof.
summary: Replace generic machine-generated finish_acceptance_signals with repo-specific interactive proof requirements, and require FINISH-VALIDATE-001 to demand user-observable interaction evidence in addition to load/export proof.
